title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic released the Mythos model family and Fable 5 (Mythos 5 with guardrails). Fable 5 will be included at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which it will require usage credits. The pricing is noted as high but performance metrics are described as impressive.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of the Mythos model family and Fable 5, a version of Mythos 5 fitted with guardrails. Fable 5 ships at no extra cost on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which access requires usage credits. The pricing is flagged as high, while the performance metrics are presented as strong.
